title: Plumber v1 — Client Onboarding Intake Form
description: Fields collected from the client during onboarding. stamp.py uses this file to render {{placeholder}} values in all prompt and KB templates before uploading to ElevenLabs.

client_slug.description: URL-safe identifier, e.g. 'bama-plumbing'. Used in webhook URLs and ElevenLabs tool names.

client_name.description: Display name of the business, e.g. 'Bama Plumbing & Drain'.

agent_name.description: Name the AI agent uses for itself on calls, e.g. 'Alex'.

voice_id.description: ElevenLabs voice ID to use for this agent's TTS. Select from ElevenLabs voice library.

webhook_base_url.description: The public base URL of the SR voice-bot service, e.g. 'https://sr-voice-bot-925407339242.us-central1.run.app'.

tool_secret.description: Shared secret for X-Vox-Tool-Secret header. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Store in GCP Secret Manager.

business_hours.description: Human-readable business hours, e.g. 'Monday–Friday 7:00 AM–5:00 PM, Saturday 8:00 AM–12:00 PM, Sunday closed'.

after_hours_policy.description: What happens when a non-emergency caller calls after hours. Options: 'emergency_only' | 'answering_service' | '24_7_emergency'. Defaults to emergency_only.

holiday_hours.description: Holiday hours statement, e.g. 'Closed Thanksgiving and Christmas Day'. Optional.

emergency_hours.description: When emergency line is staffed, e.g. '24/7' or 'after-hours only'.

emergency_after_hours_sla.description: How long until someone calls back for after-hours emergencies, e.g. '30 minutes'.

main_phone.description: Main business phone number for general transfers.

billing_phone.description: Billing department phone. Optional — defaults to main_phone.

billing_hours.description: When billing can be reached. Optional — defaults to business_hours.

escalation_name.description: Name to use when telling callers who will call them back, e.g. 'our team' or 'Jake'.

owner_name.description: Business owner's name for high-escalation transfers.

service_area_primary.description: Primary service area description, e.g. 'Birmingham, Alabama and surrounding communities'.

service_area_extended.description: Extended or call-to-confirm service area. Optional.

service_area_zips.description: List of ZIP codes served. Used to answer 'do you serve my area' questions.

dispatch_fee_policy.description: Dispatch/service call fee statement. e.g. 'There is a $95 service call fee...' or 'We offer free estimates'.

payment_methods.description: Accepted payment methods, e.g. 'Cash, check, and all major credit cards'.

warranty_period.description: How long labor is guaranteed, e.g. '90 days' or '1 year'.

financing_policy.description: Financing availability statement. Optional. Default: not offered.

commercial_policy.description: Whether commercial properties are served. e.g. 'Yes, we serve commercial properties' or 'Residential only'.

license_number_disclosure.description: License disclosure if the client wants it read on calls, e.g. 'License #AL-PLB-12345'. Optional.

google_reviews_url.description: Google Business Profile URL for reviews. Optional.

services_list.description: List of services offered. Each item is a service object.

services_not_offered.description: Plain-English list of services NOT offered, to handle caller questions. Optional.

urgency_definitions.description: Custom urgency definition for classify_service_call tool. Overrides default plumber criteria. Optional.

spanish_contact.description: Phone number for Spanish-speaking staff. If null, agent offers callback instead of transfer.

urgent_callback_sla.description: Callback commitment for urgent follow-ups, e.g. '2 hours' or 'same business day'.

complaint_callback_sla.description: Callback commitment for complaints, e.g. 'next business day'.

first_message.description: Greeting the agent says when the call connects. Must include 911 disclaimer. Example: 'Thank you for calling [client_name] — this is [agent_name]. For life-threatening emergencies, please call 911. How can I help you today?'

elevenlabs_knowledge_base_id.description: Populated by stamp.py after KB upload. Do not fill manually.
